query:
SELECT 
  pt.external_id,
  pt.receipt_no,
  CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as amount,
  pt.paid_at,
  DATE(pt.created_at) as created_date,
  pt.updated_by,
  pt.created_at
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND pt.contract_external_id = (
    SELECT external_id FROM contracts WHERE contract_no = 'CT1024-SNI001-00237-01' AND section = 'Fastfone365' LIMIT 1
  )
ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC;
